verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Early morning — 08:00
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

conversationalSummary.text: Tomorrow (TOMORROW) I’d plan for Rey Cortiço around the early-morning window, but it’s a check-first kind of call. The wind angle looks poor and Surfline consistency isn’t great, so I’d look at the Surfline cams and MEO Beachcam before leaving—if it doesn’t look clearly better than expected, I’d save the drive. If the tide is mid dropping, you might still get workable punch off the sandbanks, but the wind is the main thing to watch.

photo.alt: Photo of Rey Cortiço surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 36 kJ, 11 s period, lully 10/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 10-13s at mid tide also works on Belgas, but low tide is not a deal-breaker, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 35 kJ, 11 s period, lully 13/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 10-13s at mid tide works well on exposed beaches, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.

warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 37 kJ, 11 s period, lully 22/100, and wind is the main risk.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 10-13s at mid tide suits the reef shelves and gives long workable walls.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should help the reef hold shape.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Cantinho da Baia looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 50 kJ, 11 s period, consistent 68/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points; this is best for easy wave count and cleaner faces when the north wind is bothering exposed beaches; 10-13s at mid tide gives the sheltered bay workable wrap-around lines.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; Cantinho da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size; Cantinho da Baia may feel too soft without more push; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cantinho da Baia is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide should help the bay stay organised.
warnings: Cantinho da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size
Cantinho da Baia may feel too soft without more push
